title.en: Torah Reading in the Synagogue: What's Happening and Why
title.zh: 犹太会堂中的律法诵读:发生了什么,为什么重要
title.he: קריאת התורה בבית הכנסת: מה קורה ולמה

chinese_parallels: Imperial edict ceremonies in ancient China
Western Zhou Dynasty (1046-771 BCE) - time of Moses establishing Torah reading
Western Han Dynasty (202 BCE-9 CE) - time of Haftarah tradition beginning
Eastern Han Dynasty (25-220 CE) - time of Temple destruction
author: Torah Light Writer Agent #15
